title: stenocalyx costatus
intro: Stenocalyx costatus, a tropical plant native to Central and South America, is a species within the family Sapindaceae and is also known as the 'Yellow Trumpet Tree' due to its yellow flowers. The plant's bark and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Stenocalyx costatus include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Stenocalyx costatus is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture by herbalists, who use it to create remedies for various health issues.
